Country: Switzerland | Category: Ultra-Luxury Switzerland Tour Package

itinerary.title: Luxury Switzerland Tour
itinerary.tagline: Zurich Luxury • Lucerne Grandeur • Interlaken Alpine Retreat • Zermatt Elite • Exclusive
itinerary.overview:
Zurich Luxury • Lucerne Grandeur • Interlaken Alpine Retreat • Zermatt Elite • Exclusive Rail Journeys 08 Nights / 09 Days Ultra-Luxury Switzerland Expedition SERIAL CODE: CH-003 TRAGUIN TOUR CODE: TRG-SWI-LUX-2026 STATE / COUNTRY: Switzerland CATEGORY: Ultra-Luxury Switzerland Tour Package DURATION: 08 Nights / 09 Days Zurich (2N) + Lucerne (2N) + Interlaken (3N) + Zermatt (2N)

TOUR OVERVIEW
Indulge in the absolute height of sophistication across Switzerland with our TRAGUIN curated luxury expedition. From opulent five-star stays and world-class alpine resorts to exclusive private rail journeys and elite culinary experiences, this journey is designed for the discerning traveler, ensuring unforgettable memories in ultimate luxury. THE IMMERSIVE DAY-WISE ITINERARY
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 08 Nights / 09 Days Switzerland package (CH-003 / TRG-SWI-LUX-2026): Zurich Luxury • Lucerne Grandeur • Interlaken Alpine Retreat • Zermatt Elite • Exclusive.

days.title: VIP ARRIVAL & ZURICH LUXURY
days.description: Arrive in Zurich. VIP chauffeur transfer to your world-class hotel. Evening gourmet welcome dinner overlooking the lake.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: EXCLUSIVE ZURICH DISCOVERY
days.description: Private guided tour of Zurich’s most prestigious districts, boutique shopping, and cultural landmarks—an exclusive experience.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: TRANSFER TO LUCERNE
days.description: VIP transfer to Lucerne. Check into a premium lakeside palace hotel. Afternoon private lake cruise with gourmet catering.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: MT. TITLIS EXCLUSIVE ACCESS
days.description: Private cable car access to Mt. Titlis summit. Enjoy personal guiding, premium snow experiences, and gourmet dining at the top.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: SCENIC RAIL TO INTERLAKEN
days.description: Embark on an exclusive experience luxury scenic rail journey to Interlaken. Check into an ultra-luxury alpine retreat.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: JUNGFRAUJOCH VIP EXPEDITION
days.description: Private VIP expedition to Jungfraujoch—the Top of Europe. Enjoy personalized guiding and unparalleled panoramic views.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: TRANSFER TO ZERMATT
days.description: Transfer to Zermatt. Check into an ultra-luxury boutique suite with iconic Matterhorn views.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: MATTERHORN ELITE EXPERIENCE
days.description: Private leisure day in Zermatt, boutique shopping, and a farewell gala dinner celebrating your luxury Swiss expedition.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: DEPARTURE
days.description: Final luxury breakfast. VIP chauffeur transfer to the airport, concluding your premium Switzerland luxury expedition.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

inclusions.text: 08 Nights in handpicked premium hotels across Zurich Luxury • Lucerne Grandeur • Interlaken Alpine Retreat • Zermatt Elite • Exclusive
Private executive chauffeur-driven luxury ground transfers throughout
Mt. Titlis cable car ascent with summit snow activities
Lucerne lake cruise and Chapel Bridge sightseeing
Matterhorn-view luxury stay and exploration in Zermatt
International airfare and Switzerland entry visa processing fees
Personal expenses, laundry, room service, and mini-bar charges
Optional sightseeing excursions not specified in the itinerary
Tipping, porterage fees, and travel insurance
